text.title: AI Accessibility Automation 2026 Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the ai-accessibility-automation-2026 methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: wire-scanner
step.action: Add axe-playwright; produce JSON report per deploy.

step.name: ai-rank-and-dedupe
step.action: AI ranks violations by impact + dedupes against last 30 days.

step.name: human-lead-gate
step.action: A11y lead reviews; approves backlog cut.
step.decision-gate: If lead rejects ranking, retune AI weights.

step.name: vpat-drafting
step.action: AI drafts VPAT 2.5 section; lead signs.
